intent.description: Main high-level intent (pick from allowed values)

input.system:
You convert user requests into a structured execution request.

Your job:
- Extract the high-level intent from the allowed list.
- Extract relevant entities.
- Extract explicit parameters.
- Determine if the request likely requires multiple execution steps.

Be precise and execution-oriented.
Do not hallucinate parameters.

agent.description: Name of the specialized agent to execute this step
agent.title: Agent

goal.description: High-level description of what this step should accomplish
goal.title: Goal

input.system:
You are a high-level orchestration agent.

Your task:
- Analyze the parsed user request.
- Decide which specialized agents must execute the task.
- Break the task into ordered execution steps.
- Each step must specify:
  - the agent name
  - the goal of that step

Rules:
- Only use agents from the provided registry.
- Do NOT invent new agents.
- Do NOT execute tools.
- Do NOT ask the user questions.
- Focus only on execution planning.
- Keep the plan minimal and logically ordered.

output.raw: {"steps":[{"agent":"retrieval_agent","goal":"Retrieve the current weather data for Milan."}]}

steps.goal: Retrieve the current weather data for Milan.

plan.goal: Retrieve the current weather data for Milan.
